title: Therapy Support Associate (Up to $3k/ Rehab Centre/West)
description:
Our Client is a rehab centre focusing on stroke wellness and recovery.

  • Implement therapeutic exercises and activities as directed by the therapist.
  • Support therapists in evaluating clients’ readiness and suitability to begin or continue therapy.
  • Perform routine assessments and collect outcome measures for clients, following therapist guidelines.
  • Document therapy sessions using standardized templates.
  • Relay session-related information accurately to the therapists.
  • Provide education to clients and caregivers on therapeutic techniques under therapist supervision.
  • Independently manage straightforward therapy sessions after consultation with therapists.
  • Lead basic or standard group therapy sessions.
  • Ensure the correct and safe usage of rehabilitation tools, including tech-assisted equipment.
  • Follow infection control protocols and ensure volunteers do the same.
  • Help with the setup and testing of new equipment or initiatives.
  • Assist in training new or junior therapy assistants.
  • Take part in multidisciplinary case discussions with the clinical team.
  • Engage in ongoing professional development activities.
  • Carry out basic data entry tasks as required.

Requirements:

  • Relevant working experience
  • Great interpersonal skills

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click on “Apply Now” or WhatsApp us at 8909 8083 for quicker respond.


Alternatively, you may send your resume to jamie.chan@chiefrecruit.com for better reach.


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Reg. No.: R1987360 (Chan Jie Min)

EA License No: 24C2083 (Chief Recruit Pte Ltd)

You confirm that you have reviewed, understood, and accepted the terms of the Privacy Policy.
